tagline: Irvine Auto Center · Bay 8 · certified technicians.

hero.heading: The Irvine auto shop, engineered.
hero.subheading: An ASE-certified repair shop in the Irvine Auto Center. European and domestic vehicles, computerized diagnostic, written quote on every job. Drop your keys at Bay 8.

about.label: The shop
about.heading: ASE-certified. European-trained. Five lifts.
paragraphs: Karkrib Automotive Repair is the technical shop in Bay 8 of the Irvine Auto Center. Five lifts, ASE-certified technicians, and dedicated diagnostic equipment for both European and domestic vehicles.

We do day-one repairs, scheduled maintenance, brakes, suspension, AC, electrical, and full computerized engine diagnostic. We work on BMW, Mercedes, Audi, Lexus, Toyota, Honda — and everything else with four wheels.
Closed Sundays. Walk-in or call ahead. Free written quote before any wrench moves.

services.title: Diagnostic
services.description: Full OBD scan, live data analysis, road test if required. Printed diagnostic report. Complimentary with any repair we perform.

services.title: Brakes & Rotors
services.description: Pads, rotors, calipers, fluid. OE-spec friction. Bedded-in on the road before delivery.

services.title: Oil + Inspection
services.description: Synthetic-blend or full-synthetic, OEM filter, top-offs, complete 32-point inspection. European specs respected.

services.title: Suspension Service
services.description: Struts, shocks, control arms, bushings, sway-bar links. Four-wheel alignment after every install.

services.title: AC Service
services.description: Diagnostic, leak detection, evac-and-recharge. EPA-certified. Done before the OC summer.

services.title: Engine Diagnostic
services.description: Computer scan, harness check, live data interpretation, repair plan with written cost breakdown.

reviews.name: Andre L.
reviews.text: Karkrib has been the shop for both my BMWs for five years. Their pricing is straight, their diagnosis is precise, and their work is exactly what I'd expect from the dealer minus the dealer prices.

reviews.name: Priya S.
reviews.text: Tried Karkrib after years of dealer service that always took a week and came back wrong. They had my car back to me in two days with a written report. I won't go anywhere else now.

reviews.name: Carlos B.
reviews.text: Walked in for a brake job and they upgraded me to performance pads on a dealer-warranty inspection that turned out to be free. Real shop, real techs, real people.

contact.mapEmbedQuery: Karkrib Automotive Repair, 51 Auto Center Dr, Irvine, CA 92618
